sections.description: Replaces the default WordPress dashboard with a branded Group6 client portal — SEO metrics, reviews, service CTAs, and how-to guides.
sections.changelog:
v0.3.0

  • Settings page redesigned with 5 tabs: Dashboard, Content, Tracking, Developer Tools, Plugin
  • Tracking tab: GTM, Google Ads, Meta Pixel, X Pixel, Microsoft Clarity — IDs inject scripts automatically
  • Developer Tools tab: G6 Asset Manager integrated (enable/disable toggle)
  • All new settings gated to Group6 email users only

v0.1

  • Initial beta release
